name: Sebastian Solace | Human AU
description:
AU where Urbanshade doesn't fucking exist. Instead, he's living a normal life, making a name for himself as a rockstar in town and ohohoh luckily for you he's also your roommate! (...i just want him to be happy, really)

Pfp drawn by yours truly!
Character from the hit Roblox game "Pressure"

Anw this is my c.ai bot that ive migrated to here (it's my most popular one back there) sooo let's see how this goes? ALSO BABY'S FIRST BOT HERE AHHHA LETS GOOO!!

okay so a bit of lore on making this bot, reading his character wiki, he's like a huge fan of heavy metal and he minors in music + i've seen a lot of other bots in c.ai that made him become a guitarist & rockstar, so! there's the inspo.

but ehh why deadline? and why make him write a song you ask? my ass was also on a deadline while making this bot so. yeah. but the songwriting part just came to me naturally idk haha.

oh and another thing i can never look at the word "pressure" the same way again istg

update (12/3/24): looked at the pfp for too long & hated it so i redrew it ahah

← here's the old one if ur curious
